channel.title: +00 Intro on ज्योतिषम् py
channel.description: Recent content in +00 Intro on ज्योतिषम् py

item.title: Computation parameters
item.description: 🌏क्षेत्रम् (सहकार-नगरम्, कल्याणपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = true prefer_eight_fold_day_division = true julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" fest_repos_excluded_patterns = [ ".*kAnchI.*", ".*mAdhva.*", ".*smArta-misc.*", ".*zRGgErI.*", ".*nAyanmAr.*", ".*ALvAr.*", ".*sangIta-kRt.*", ".*temples.*",] jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/Apastamba_seasonal, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic-non-tropical, mahApuruSha/general-indic-tropical, mahApuruSha/sci-tech, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/nakta-vrata-yoga, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/luno-tropical/smArta, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH, time_focus/kalpAdiH, time_focus/adhyayana, time_focus/manvAdiH
